## Journal.JournalEventType type

Types of events that can be recorded in a cooking journal

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type JournalEventType = 'ingredient-add' | 'ingredient-remove' | 'ingredient-modify' | 'ingredient-substitute' | 'scale-adjust' | 'note';
```
